reasoning: The Padres have had an outstanding start to the 2025 season, currently holding the best record in MLB at 25-13 as of May 11, 2025. This hot start, highlighted by a recent 21-0 victory, substantially boosts their playoff chances (FanGraphs likely estimates their playoff odds at 65-75% given this record). However, their path to the National League Pennant is hindered by the Los Angeles Dodgers, who remain heavy favorites to win the NL West. The Padres will likely have to navigate the expanded Wild Card path, which suppresses their probability of winning the Pennant. Preseason odds had them at around +1200 (7.7%), and Polymarket traded at 7% on May 1. Given their continued strong play over the first week of May, an upward adjustment to 10% appropriately balances their impressive results with the realities of true-talent regression and their difficult playoff route.
